# systemExtensionWillBecomeDisabled(_:) | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ System Extensions ](/documentation/systemextensions)

-  systemExtensionWillBecomeDisabled(_:) 

Instance Method# systemExtensionWillBecomeDisabled(_:)

macOS 15.1+

```
optional func systemExtensionWillBecomeDisabled(_ systemExtensionInfo: OSSystemExtensionInfo)
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/systemextensions/ossystemextensionsworkspaceobserver/systemextensionwillbecomedisabled(_:)#discussion)

This delegate method will be called when the user disables an already enabled system extension, or when the system extension is first installed and is in the disabled state.
